headline: Qualcomm Stock Is Down 28%. Is This a Once-in-a-Lifetime Buying Opportunity?
summary: The pullback makes perfect short-term sense, but it underestimates just how well the company could snap out of the current funk once the tide finally turns.

headline: QBit Semiconductor Plans Taiwan IPO in 2026
summary: QBit Semiconductor LTD. ("QBit") announced that it has completed its Series B fundraising round with participation from an affiliate of Arm Holdings plc. Following this investment, QBit plans to apply for an initial public offering in Taiwan by the fourth quarter of 2026.
